blended.narrative: Bluewood is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,211 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 11.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 3" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
